messages.content:
Bot1 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks

arguments.message: Loot picked up: Leather Tunic equipped, Bow equipped, Stone Sword in off-hand. 24 Arrows, 12 Bread, 40 Oak Planks. Bot2 at 1.4 blocks. No threats.

messages.content: Me <EQUIPPED GEAR>: Equipped Leather Tunic to torso.
Me <EQUIPPED>: Now holding Bow.
Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Loot picked up: Leather Tunic equipped, Bow equipped, Stone Sword in off-hand. 24 Arrows, 12 Bread, 40 Oak Planks. Bot2 at 1.4 blocks. No threats."
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Loot confirmed: Leather Tunic, Bow, Stone Sword, 24 Arrows, 12 Bread, 40 Oak Planks. No threats. Plan: Equip Leather Tunic first, then ensure Bow is equipped. Confirm status after.
Me <IDLE>: Chose not to act.

Bot1 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 15 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 16 is 3.2 blocks away
Me <BOW ATTACK>: Attacking 16 with a bow.
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: New threats approaching! Zombie 16 is 3.9 blocks, Zombie 15 is 5.0 blocks. Bot1 is safe nearby. Focusing on closest target first.
Me <BOW ATTACK>: Attacking 16 with a bow.

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 15
- zombie id 16

I used or lost:
- 4 Arrow
Me <EATING>: Eating bread until hunger is full.

Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Threats cleared. Used 3 arrows. Health full, no new threats. Shelter built with oak planks. Status: Leather Tunic equipped, Bow equipped, Stone Sword ready. 19 Arrows left, 12 Bread left.

- 1 Arrow
- 1 Bread
